entry.title: IDC W56HZV13D0008 (P00222) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS LAND SYSTEMS INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION OF AWARD INSTRUCTIONS FOR CLIN 0333AC, RESET ORDERING PERIOD 3 CLOSEOUT

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
